title: Storm Over Lisbon
writer: Doris Gilbert, Dane Lussier, Elizabeth Meehan
actors: Vera Ralston, Richard Arlen, Erich von Stroheim
plot: Deresco, owner of a night club in neutral Portugal, works as a free-lance spy for everybody who can afford his price. He tries to get information from US agent John Craig with help from immigrant dancer Maritza, but she falls in l...
